title: Mari virtual tour guide app
wikitext:
[]: Mari virtual tour guide app             Quote Post by darthikari » Sun Aug 19, 2012 9:38 am Saw this on ANN the other day, On Thursday, the Japanese developer Kayac released an iOS tourist's guide to San Francisco in the U.S. App Store — with Evangelion pilot Mari as the guide, complete with her English dub voice Trina Nishimura. The free guide has text and audio entries for over 50 sites of interest throughout the streets of San Francisco.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Aug 19, 2012 11:33 am I would have preferred Misato, but seeing as I don't have a Mobile Device I can't really make up criticism for it. And besides, It's just a fun little tool to use. It's things like this that make me a little jealous of people with Cell Phones.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Sun Aug 19, 2012 12:04 pm Too bad San Fran would be underwater after Second Impact...

[]:             Quote Post by StratoSakuya...AF » Sun Aug 19, 2012 12:19 pm driftking18594 wrote: Too bad San Fran would be underwater after Second Impact...
